item.title: Skill: email-digest
item.intent: Deliver the email-digest skill so the Email Manager agent triages inbox, categorizes, and proposes responses with approval gates. No auto-send, no data leaves the machine.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: First autonomous capability the user sees. Pairs with CQ-017 (Email Manager blueprint). This skill is why the user chose ClawHQ over Gmail. SEQUENCING: Requires CQ-021 (skill lifecycle + vetting — email-digest must go through stage->vet->approve->activate pipeline), CQ-025 (approval queue — 'propose responses with approval gates' is the core safety feature), and CQ-017 (Email Manager blueprint to define context). Acceptance: SKILL.md + prompts installed via skill lifecycle pipeline; agent triages inbox, categorizes emails, proposes responses with approval gates; runs on 15min cron; no data leaves machine (local Ollama).
steps: Create SKILL.md defining email triage behavior and boundaries
Write prompts for inbox categorization, summarization, and response proposal
Configure 15min cron schedule for inbox checks
Integrate with approval queue — proposed responses require user approval
acceptanceCriteria: SKILL.md + prompts installed via skill lifecycle pipeline
Agent triages inbox and categorizes emails correctly
Proposed responses queue for approval (no auto-send)
No data leaves machine (local Ollama only)
